science.title: This donut-shaped discovery just shattered a 150-year math rule
science.summary: A 150-year-old rule in geometry has been proven wrong. Mathematicians found two different doughnut-shaped surfaces that look identical when measured locally but are actually different overall. science.title: This new camera captures what happens in a trillionth of a second
science.summary: Scientists have unveiled a breakthrough imaging method that can capture the hidden details of events unfolding in trillionths of a second. science.title: Mezcal worm in a bottle DNA test reveals a surprise
science.summary: The famous mezcal “worm” has long puzzled scientists, but DNA testing has finally cracked the case. Researchers found that all sampled larvae were actually agave redworm moth caterpillars—not a mix of species as once believed. science.title: Scientists Stunned After Finding Plant Thought Extinct for 60 Years

science.title: Scientists Discover Tiny New Spider That Hunts Prey 6x Its Size
science.summary: Scientists discovered a tiny wall-dwelling spider that preys on common urban pests and may aid natural pest control. Its resemblance to a distant Galapagos species suggests a possible evolutionary link. medicine.title: Next-generation KRAS G12C inhibitor elisrasib elicited promising response rates in patients with advanced lung cancer

medicine.title: Simple “gut reset” may stop weight gain after Ozempic or Wegovy
medicine.summary: A new minimally invasive procedure may help people keep weight off after stopping popular drugs like Ozempic and semaglutide—something most patients struggle with. medicine.title: Hidden virus in your gut may be linked to colon cancer
medicine.summary: A newly discovered virus hiding inside a common gut bacterium could help explain one of medicine’s long-standing mysteries: why a microbe found in both healthy people and cancer patients is linked to colorectal cancer. medicine.title: Two common drugs may reverse fatty liver disease, study finds
medicine.summary: Scientists have discovered that combining two existing drugs can dramatically reduce liver fat linked to a common and often silent disease. mathematics.title: In Math, Rigor Is Vital. But Are Digitized Proofs Taking It Too Far?
mathematics.summary: The quest to make mathematics rigorous has a long and spotty history — one mathematicians can learn from as they push to formalize everything in the computer program Lean. space.title: Liquid Lifeline: NASA Tech Could Create IV Fluid In Space
space.summary: On every crewed mission, NASA packs pouches of a potentially life-saving liquid in its cargo, known as IV (or intravenous) fluid. astronomy.title: The Planet Haul That Changes Everything.

astronomy.title: JWST Hunts for an 'Earth-Moon' Twin in a Habitable Zone, But the Star Has Other Plans
astronomy.summary: The Moon has played a huge role in the development of Earth. It stabilizes the planet, tempered dramatic climate swings, and possibly even provided the tidal heating that might have led to the first life forms. astronomy.title: Two Worlds Where the Sun Never Moves
astronomy.summary: One side is scorched to over 200 degrees, while the other is plunged into a darkness so cold it falls below minus 200. astronomy.title: James Webb Space Telescope peers into a dying star surrounded by mysterious buckyballs: 'The structures we're seeing now are breathtaking'

astronomy.title: Catching the Earliest Stars in the Universe
